HoverColors.UI.Title: Mochi's Hover Colors
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Info: Click this to turn tooltips On/Off.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Close: Close/Exit. Default hotkey: H or click on the Game top-left icon does the same.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: Outline: click to reset color and alpha to game defaults.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetFill: Fill: click to reset to 0% (game default).
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: Opacity of the fill area inside the outline.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: Guidelines opacity. Changes save automatically. Tap icon to restore your saved guideline default. Hold icon to save the current value as that default.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity: Guidelines opacity. Below 15% is not advised because the guides may become hard to see.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.SurfaceToggle:
Hide Surface tool boundary preview fill.
Default hotkey: L.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset1:
Slot 1 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 and slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset2:
Slot 2 — tap to apply, hold 0.8s to overwrite with your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 and slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetPresets:
↺ 1st click: resets both preset slots to mod defaults.
↺ 2nd click: restores your previous colors.
If already at defaults, does nothing.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.DistrictColors: Click for District overlay fill and boundary line color/opacity.
